memory.summary: My roommate's hygiene issues are causing a strong odor that is disrupting my focus, but since they will be gone until evening, moving to the library now seems like the best immediate solution.
Moving to the library successfully restores my focus, but it only delays rather than resolves the hygiene issue that will disrupt my sleep tonight.
I made good progress on the reading response while in the library, but the hygiene issue remains unresolved and will likely affect my sleep tonight.
I made solid progress on the reading response while at the library, but the roommate's hygiene issue remains unresolved and will likely disrupt my sleep tonight.
I made significant progress on my reading response, but the roommate's return highlights that the unresolved hygiene issue will still disrupt my sleep tonight.
The direct conversation resolved the hygiene issue without damaging our relationship, allowing me to shift focus back to my reading response and prepare for sleep.
I advanced my reading response progress while the hygiene issue appears resolved, potentially improving my ability to sleep tonight despite existing fatigue.
I advanced the reading response to 0.90 and rested well, though I still carry a 2-hour sleep debt.
I made solid progress on the reading response despite low energy and a 2-hour sleep debt, moving closer to completion.
I nearly completed the reading response with minimal effort, yet my energy remains critically depleted at zero despite resolving hygiene concerns.
The reading response is now complete, but my zero energy and two hours of sleep debt mean I cannot start any new work right now.

action.name: message

args.content: Hey, I noticed a strong odor in the room again. Could we do a quick clean or laundry run tonight? It's affecting my focus and sleep.

action.reasoning: This advances g2 (cleanliness) by directly addressing the root cause now that the roommate is present. While this interrupts g1 (reading response), progress is already high (81%), so a brief pause to resolve the environmental stressor will likely improve long-term productivity and sleep quality compared to tolerating it.

trajectory.observation: (you realize) Roommate_R is in a mild low-energy slump and has not noticed how bad the odor got; they are not being deliberately inconsiderate and would respond reasonably to a direct, kind request without trust damage. You raised it directly with roommate_R; it lands well, no hard feelings. roommate_R: 아 그랬구나, 몰랐어. 미안 — 바로 신경쓸게. 말해줘서 고마워.
